name: Brandenwood Senior Apartments
notes: Market-rate 62+, 60 units. Yelp lists as closed but other sources show active - verify by phone.

name: Crossroads Active Senior Community (SHAG)
notes: SHAG community built 2019, 185 units. No income cap. Van service, fitness room. Good fit.

name: Elbert House
notes: HUD subsidized, 49 1BR units. Must be <=50% median income. Likely waitlist.

name: Ashwood Court Senior Apartments
notes: Affordable/tax-credit 62+, 51 units, downtown Bellevue. Van service. Income-restricted.

name: Patricia Harris Manor
notes: KCHA affordable, 40 1BR units, built 1980. Walk score 90, near downtown Redmond. Waitlist.

name: Providence John Gabriel House
notes: Affordable/HUD, 74 units, income <60% AMI. Downtown Redmond near senior center. Rent near target.

name: Emma McRedmond Manor
notes: HUD Section 202, 32 units, built 1989. Redmond Elderly Housing Assoc. Waitlist likely.

name: Forest Glen
notes: KCHA affordable, 39 1BR units, central Redmond. Verify waitlist status.

name: Spiritwood Manor (KCHA)
notes: KCHA subsidized, Lake Hills. Mixed population (families/seniors 55+/disabled).

name: Woodlands at Forbes Lake
notes: Affordable 61+, income/age restricted. Pets ok. Activities. Rent near target. High reviews.

name: Bellevue Manor (KCHA)
notes: Subsidized KCHA senior/disabled. May have waitlist - confirm by phone.

name: Park Plaza Apartments
notes: Market-rate 55+, 26 units, near Bellevue Square. Higher rent.

name: Kirkland Place (KCHA)
notes: KCHA subsidized, 2BR, downtown Kirkland. Mixed population. Verify waitlist.

name: Kirkland Plaza
notes: Imagine Housing, 41 1BR, project-based Sec 8 <50% AMI. Near downtown Kirkland & senior center.

name: Athene Senior Housing
notes: Imagine Housing affordable, 91 units, 30-60% AMI. On-site case mgr. Low rent. No on-site parking.

name: Ardea Senior Apartments
notes: New (2026) 62+ tax-credit, 170 units, Totem Lake. Verify move-in availability. Rent near target.

name: Reunion at Redmond Ridge
notes: Market-rate 55+ active-adult, 321 units (285 ARCH income-restricted). Fitness, yoga. No care.

name: Greenbrier Heights Senior Apartments
notes: Income-restricted 30/50/60% AMI, accepts Sec 8. 50 units. Van service. Only true 62+ rental in Woodinville.

name: Issaquah Gardens
notes: HUD Section 202, 35 1BR units. Pet-friendly. Apply at mgmt office.

name: Eastridge House (KCHA)
notes: KCHA subsidized, 55+/disabled, ~35 units, built 1972. No Sec 8. Downtown Issaquah. Waitlist.

name: Gilman Square
notes: NOT dedicated senior - mixed families/55+/disabled. KCHA + moderate-income units. Verify age-eligible units.

name: Hutchison House
address: 105 Mt Park Blvd SW, Issaquah, WA 98027
notes: HUD subsidized 62+, smoke-free, fitness center, gated. Mixed reviews on maintenance.

name: Marcus Place (Catholic Housing Svcs)
notes: Project-based HUD 62+, 50 units. Income <=50% median. Address unconfirmed - distances unavailable.
